# Lsor

**Summary**: An iterative method that solves for individual rows successively until the whole grid is swept.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1993-al-towailib|Al-Towailib, 1993]] used LSOR to compare iteration counts and CPU time against PSOR and ADIP.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The LSOR method required 11.74 seconds of total CPU time, which was higher than PSOR but lower than ADIP. ([[1993-al-towailib|Al-Towailib, 1993, p. 179]])
